content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Competitive Programmer". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1266/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print YES if it is possible to make all elements of the array equal, otherwise print NO.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if all elements of the array can be made equal by subtracting the minimum element from each element and checking if the result is divisible by k.
